subject: [PATCH 4/4] arm64: route crash_smp_send_stop() last resort through SDEI

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds the SDEI (System Description Event Interface) as a last resort to stop CPUs in an arm64 system when normal methods fail. It signals event 0 at still-online CPUs, which runs crash_save_cpu() on the wedged context and parks them. This approach is chosen because an SDEI-stopped CPU never completes its event, making it less recoverable than a normal stop. The patch adds functionality to handle this scenario and includes changes to various kernel files.
